description: Iman Motamity introduces the Solana Incubator program, highlighting its purpose to support startups in building alongside Solana Labs. The program focuses on tailored support, hands-on development, and fostering connections within the ecosystem. Applications for the second cohort are open, emphasizing in-person collaboration and mentorship.
topic_summary: Overview of the Solana Incubator program, its goals, and the application process for the upcoming cohort. Discussion on the importance of in-person collaboration and tailored support for startups in the Web3 space.
